translation.home_hero_subtitle: Your doctor is just a click away
translation.home_hero_desc: Find your doctor, book your appointment, and track your health
translation.home_hero_placeholder: Search for a doctor, specialty, clinic...
translation.cta_desc: Join thousands of patients who trust Tabibi
translation.footer_description: Medical appointment booking platform in Algeria
translation.login_subtitle: Log in to your Tabibi account
translation.search_subtitle: Search among thousands of doctors across Algeria
translation.otp_email_desc: A 6-digit code will be sent to your email address. Valid for 10 minutes.
translation.otp_phone_desc: A 6-digit code will be sent to your phone number. (Dev mode: code shown on screen)
translation.patient_choice_desc: Choose who will receive this medical visit
translation.no_reasons_defined: No specific reasons defined for this doctor
translation.select_date_first: Select a date first to see available times
translation.confirmation_email_msg: A confirmation will be sent to your email
translation.privacy_desc: By completing this booking, you agree that your personal and medical data will be stored securely. This data is only used to facilitate the appointment process. We are committed to protecting your privacy.
translation.privacy_agree: I agree to the terms and privacy policy
translation.success_msg: Your appointment has been registered with
translation.email_sent_msg: Confirmation email sent — check your inbox
translation.no_times_this_day: No times available this day — try another
translation.cancel_confirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this appointment?
translation.id_verification_desc: Confirm your email and phone number to secure your account.
translation.add_email_first: Add your email first to confirm it
translation.page_not_found_desc: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.
translation.are_you_doctor: Are you a doctor? Join Tabibi
translation.doctor_cta_desc: Manage your appointments and clinic smarter and faster
translation.about_desc: We aim to simplify healthcare in Algeria through technology and innovation.
translation.mission_desc: Providing fast and easy access to healthcare for all Algerian citizens in all wilayas.
translation.values_desc: Privacy, trust, and transparency are the core pillars upon which we build our platform.
translation.vision_desc: To be the premier and leading destination in the field of digital health in our region.
translation.learn_more_subtitle: Our team is ready to answer all your questions and suggestions.
translation.start_journey_btn: Start your journey with us now
translation.contact_subtitle: Are you a doctor or clinic owner? We are here to help you with your digital transformation.
translation.contact_success_title: Your message has been sent successfully!
translation.contact_success_desc: Thank you for contacting us. Our team will review your request and contact you as soon as possible.
translation.note_desc: The technical support team will respond to your inquiries within 24 business hours.
translation.register_clinic_desc: Join the largest medical network in Algeria and increase your clinic's visibility.
translation.why_join_2: Full clinic profile with photos and specialties.
translation.why_join_3: Direct communication with patients via a secure chat system.
translation.why_join_4: Periodic statistics and reports on your clinic's activity.
translation.join_verification_msg: Our team will contact you within 24 hours to verify the data and activate the account.
translation.search_doctor_desc: Search by specialty, location or name
translation.attend_consult_desc: Get care at the scheduled time
translation.how_it_works_subtitle: A few simple steps separate you from your next medical appointment
translation.step1_desc: Use advanced search to find doctors by specialty, location, or name. See reviews from real patients.
translation.step2_desc: View available slots in real-time and book instantly.
translation.step3_desc: Receive instant confirmation and reminders before the appointment.
translation.step4_desc: Communicate with the clinic in advance for any questions via the integrated chat system.
translation.privacy_policy_subtitle: We are committed to protecting your privacy and personal data in accordance with applicable Algerian laws.
translation.privacy_section1_desc: We collect data that you provide to us directly, such as name, phone number, and email address, in addition to information necessary for medical appointments. We are committed to following Law No. 18-07 related to the protection of natural persons towards the processing of personal data in Algeria.
translation.privacy_section2_desc: Your data is used only for the purpose of facilitating medical appointments, sending reminders, and communicating with you regarding our services. Your medical data is only shared with the doctor or clinic where you chose to book.
translation.privacy_section3_desc: You have the right to access your personal data, rectify it, or request its deletion at any time through your account settings or by contacting us directly.
translation.privacy_section4_desc: We use advanced technical and administrative security measures to protect your data from unauthorized access, loss, or misuse.
translation.terms_subtitle: Please read the terms of use carefully before using the platform.
translation.term1_desc: By using the Tabibi platform, you agree to be bound by these terms of use. If you do not agree with any part of them, please stop using the platform.
translation.term2_desc: The user is responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of their account information and all activities that occur under their account.
translation.term3_desc: Tabibi is an intermediary platform to facilitate bookings. The doctor or clinic are solely responsible for providing the medical service.
translation.term4_desc: Please respect reserved appointments and cancel the appointment in advance if you cannot attend the medical visit.
